type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Calculations were done using the emission factors from the CEPEI Technical Memo June 14, 2021 which were based on dilution tunnel tasing and includes filterable and condensable PMs. This change was made because it's more representative than the previous method for natural gas facilities; using emission factors from the AP-42

type.fr: Commentaire sur le statut de déclaration de la substance

comments.comment: Hydrochloric acid is used as a by-product for the feedwater to generate steam. The MPO for this fluctuates based on the time of the purchase of the product and the production level of steam. We do not directly measure how much is released, but it is assumed to be released with the steam.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le statut de déclaration de la substance

comments.comment: Dioxins and furans were not released on site as this is a natural gas-fired facility; no change from previous years.

reasonsForNoActivities.fr: Autres (précisez dans le champ des commentaires)

p2Plan.noActivitiesComment:
TransAlta does not have a documented facility specific pollution prevention plan, but does undergo various management practices and technologies in an attempt to prevent or abate pollution. For example:
- Stack NOx Emissions: procedures are in place if the gas turbine NOx emissions were to be deemed too high
- Emissions Monitoring and Controls: steps are outlined to ensure the NOx and CO concentrations in the HRSG exhaust are properly recorded
- Ozone Depleting Substances: procedures are in place as part of the purchasing, maintenance, and disposal for equipment that may contain ozone-depleting refrigerants or substances
- Waste management: re-circulation, onsite recycling, reuse, or recovery of materials or substances where possible
- Improved inventory management or purchasing techniques
- Prevention of leaks and spills
- Good operating practices or pollution prevention training
- Environmental monitoring
- Environmental assessments and audits
- Waste management
- Pollution abatement and control (end-of-pipe) process
